completed_tasks.name: Wave 1 — FastAPI scaffold + jira_config model + SQL migration
Wave 2 — JiraService (Fernet + Jira auth) + REST endpoints
All CR/WR issues remediated (SSRF, FERNET_KEY, timeout)
ConnectionPage redesigned to match Figma — single button hero layout
Footer fixed to bottom of screen (flex: 1 on heroGrid)
Replace Basic Auth modal with Atlassian OAuth 2.0 (3LO)
/api/auth/me — decrypt token, call Atlassian, return user info + has_projects
NoProjectPage + DashboardPage display user avatar + name from /api/auth/me
POST /api/auth/logout — delete DB token + sessionStorage clear + redirect to /
ConnectionPage auth check on mount — auto-redirect if token valid + spinner
has_projects field added to /api/auth/me response for routing

remaining_tasks.name: Re-scope UAT — 3 new OAuth tests replacing old Basic Auth modal tests
Run re-scoped UAT and confirm pass
Mark Phase 1 complete in ROADMAP.md + STATE.md

blockers.description: UAT tests (01-HUMAN-UAT.md) test removed Basic Auth modal — must be re-scoped before running
blockers.workaround: Re-scope to 3 tests: (1) ConnectionPage renders 'Continue with Atlassian' button, (2) button redirects to Atlassian OAuth URL, (3) after OAuth → /no-project shows user name + avatar in navbar

decisions.decision: Atlassian OAuth 2.0 (3LO) over Basic Auth modal
decisions.rationale: Required for future API access + better UX; prompt=consent enables account switching

decisions.decision: Token encrypted with Fernet at rest in SQLite oauth_tokens table
sessionStorage for user display cache, SQLite for auth persistence
decisions.rationale: sessionStorage cleared on tab close; SQLite token survives browser close for session persistence

decisions.decision: Logout deletes DB token (not just sessionStorage)
decisions.rationale: Full logout enables clean account switching on next login
Atlassian shows account picker on every new auth — enables multi-account switching after logout
ConnectionPage needs routing destination without extra API call

next_action: Re-scope 01-HUMAN-UAT.md with 3 new OAuth tests, run them, then mark Phase 1 complete in ROADMAP.md + STATE.md
context_notes: Two sessions of auth work. Session N: OAuth 2.0 (3LO) replacing Basic Auth modal, /api/auth/me, user info in nav. Session N+1: logout (POST /api/auth/logout deletes DB token), session persistence (ConnectionPage auto-redirects on mount if token valid, spinner prevents login page flash). All features confirmed working end-to-end with real Atlassian account. Only UAT re-scope + phase close remain before Phase 2.
